notes.text: sap.m.PlanningCalendar: "1 Month" view responsiveness
sap.m.Dialog: min-width 100% on narrow viewports
p13n.SelectionPanel: add anouncements for reordering
sap.m.Token: Apply focus styles on mobile devices
sap.m.Dialog: avoid redundant screen reader announcement when title matches value state
sap.m.DatePicker: respects constrains set in the binding
sap.m/sap.ui.unified Menu: fix separator a11y tree
We've now added the title property of the PDFViewer to the iframe instance
TabContainer: Add support for zooming in TabStrip on mobile devices
sap.m.IconTabBar: overflow button focus outline now visible during mousedown
p13n.Popup: Fix imports
sap.m.InstanceManager: closeAllDialogs promise is now resolved when dialog is destroyed during closing
p13n panels: announcement on reset are missing
sap.m.Menu: context menu now opens when another menu is open
sap.m.Toolbar: fix arrow-key navigation issue
sap.m.ColorPalette: fix buttons active state
mdc/SmartChart: 'View By' popover now have correct announcement.
sap.m.MessageBox: Dialog role is now set based on the message type
sap.m.ObjectHeader: image is decorative if the alt is empty
sap.m.MessageView - Details view is now preserved after resize
We've now introduced AdditionalPriority property for generic tile when ActionMode or Article Mode containing FrameType Stretch is enabled
We've now fixed the validation issues that occurred when renaming a URL document in UploadSet
sap.m.Dialog: Screen reader no longer announces the footer button before the link in content
sap.m.MultiInput: no change event on own Token focus
sap.m.Select: Defer value state popup open() to complete setter chain
sap.m.DateRangeSelection: returns parameters based on validity
sap.m.Menu: fix hover state for item with open submenu
sap.m.IconTabHeader: End overflow tab now displays correct count on mobile devices
sap.m.MessagePopover: title level correctly set
core/Element: Skip focus redirect on same-parent move
We've now fixed the invalid aria-label on GenericTile with role="presentation"
We've now fixed the incorrect list roles in HeaderContainer that were causing incorrect screen reader announcements
sap.m.DynamicDateRange: option value is not stripped if
sap.tnt.SideNavigation: add search functionality
We've fixed an issue where the JAWS screen reader launched an application instead of accessing the overflow menu when you pressed Enter on the More button
sap.m.Toolbar: Fix arrow key navigation for Slider, RangeSlider and MultiInput
sap.m.Tokenizer: announce token deletion
sap.m.MessageBox: box shadow of the header fixed
We've now fixed the validation issues that occurred when renaming a URL document in UploadSetwithTable
sap.m.Wizard: Progress navigator is properly updated
